steps.title: Identify the result
steps.content: The first sentence says a turtle shell appears external and armor-like. The next sentence describes the misconception that follows from that appearance: people often assume the shell is an exoskeleton.

steps.title: Choose the causal link
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B signal a pivot or contrast, but the second sentence follows from the first. Choice C signals an example, not a consequence. The remaining transition means "therefore" and fits the cause-effect relationship. The answer is D.
